plugin_desc: Nokia（原 Alcatel-Lucent Enterprise）OmniSwitch 系列以太网交换机专用 SNMP 采集模板（ALCATEL-IND1-HEALTH-MIB / ALCATEL-IND1-CHASSIS-MIB，企业号 6486）。除标准 IF-MIB 64 位 HC 接口流量外，额外采集 Nokia 私有 OID 的设备健康指标——CPU 使用率与内存使用率（healthModuleTable，均以百分比直接上报）、机箱温度（chasChassisTemp，℃）、风扇状态与电源状态（chasEntPhysOperStatus，经 telegraf processors.enum 归一为 1=正常/2=异常）。适用品牌型号——Nokia/ALE OmniSwitch 6/9 系列园区与数据中心交换机（企业号 6486）。
name: Switch

metrics.name: device_cpu_usage
metrics.description: This metric reports the CPU utilisation percentage of the Nokia OmniSwitch (ALCATEL-IND1-HEALTH-MIB healthModuleCpuLatest), aggregated as the average across modules. Sustained high CPU can indicate control-plane overload, protocol churn, or abnormal traffic and may slow management response or forwarding.

metrics.name: interface_ifHCInOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of bytes received over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCInOctets counter (ifXTable). The 64-bit counter avoids the rapid wrap of the 32-bit ifInOctets on high-speed switch ports, keeping the rate accurate.

metrics.name: interface_ifHCOutOctets
metrics.description: This metric calculates the average rate of bytes sent over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCOutOctets counter (ifXTable). The 64-bit counter avoids the rapid wrap of the 32-bit ifOutOctets on high-speed switch ports, keeping the rate accurate.

metrics.name: device_memory_usage
metrics.description: This metric reports the memory utilisation percentage of the Nokia OmniSwitch (ALCATEL-IND1-HEALTH-MIB healthModuleMemoryLatest), reported directly as a percentage and aggregated as the average across modules. Sustained high memory may indicate a leak or resource pressure and can degrade device stability.

metrics.name: device_temperature_celsius
metrics.description: This metric reports the chassis temperature in degrees Celsius of the Nokia OmniSwitch (ALCATEL-IND1-CHASSIS-MIB chasChassisTemp), aggregated as the maximum across sensors. High temperatures can indicate cooling failure or airflow obstruction and risk thermal shutdown.

metrics.name: device_fan_state
metrics.description: This metric reports the fan operational state of the Nokia OmniSwitch (ALCATEL-IND1-CHASSIS-MIB chasEntPhysOperStatus for fan entities), normalised via telegraf processors.enum to 1=normal / 2=abnormal. An abnormal fan reduces cooling capacity and raises the risk of thermal shutdown.

metrics.name: device_psu_state
metrics.description: This metric reports the power-supply state of the Nokia OmniSwitch (ALCATEL-IND1-CHASSIS-MIB chasEntPhysOperStatus for power-supply entities), normalised via telegraf processors.enum to 1=normal / 2=abnormal. A failed power supply removes redundancy and a single-supply failure can take the device offline.
